svg.title: Solar dashboard deployment architecture
svg.desc: Flow from internet through Cloudflare, FritzBox, Synology to Vaadin app, plus GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline

g.text: Let's Encrypt via acme.sh on Synology
DNS challenge via Cloudflare API · auto-renews every 90 days · no ports 80/443 needed for validation
Certificate assigned to Synology reverse proxy → HTTPS for solar.softhenge.ch
